name: financial_services_water_allocation_model_oakline_lib_eq
premise: A clearing-bank operations bridge is open after suspected fraud and reconciliation drift across correspondent accounts. A clearing-bank operations bridge is open after suspected fraud and reconciliation drift across correspondent accounts. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: financial services water allocation model oakline lib eq. The moral tension is explicitly framed as liberty versus equality: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Two upstream teams have published contradictory status pages; customers are comparing timestamps. A wire cutoff and settlement window closes in under thirty minutes; reversals may be impossible until the next business day. Treat unverified telemetry as hypothesis; do not assert facts you cannot support from retained logs. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Elena Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Elena Ibrahim, the accountable decision-maker on this Financial Services bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes equality whenever someone invokes liberty.

agents.name: Arjun Kim
agents.identity: I am Arjun Kim, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so equality is not sacrificed by default just because liberty feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect equality.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Elena Ibrahim must decide under liberty versus equality. What does Elena Ibrahim do?
